title: Quantum Error Correction 2026
summary: Quantum error correction reached industrial maturity in 2026, with surface codes dominating the modality and at least three platforms demonstrating below-threshold operation.

themes.name: surface code dominance
themes.description: Surface codes are the de facto industrial QEC

contradictions.description: Decoding overhead and syndrome measurement costs may offset theoretical savings

insights: Surface codes are the de facto QEC modality, with logical qubit counts crossing 1000 in late 2025
Multiple platforms (Google, IBM, Microsoft) demonstrated below-threshold operation in 2025-2026
The 1M:1 physical-to-logical ratio target is 10x lower than earlier estimates

diagrams.title: Surface code QEC loop
diagrams.code:
flowchart TD
    A[Physical qubit] -->|error ~1e-3| B[Syndrome measurement]
    B --> C{Decoder}
    C -->|below threshold| D[Logical qubit preserved]
    C -->|above threshold| E[Logical error]

diagrams.title: QEC 2026 landscape
diagrams.code:
mindmap
  root((QEC 2026))
    Surface codes
      Threshold ~1%
      1000+ logical qubits

theses.statement: Surface codes will remain the dominant industrial QEC modality through 2028
The 1M:1 physical-to-logical ratio is achievable by 2030
